name: part_008
file: tmp_【3D LIVE CONCERT 生誕ライブ】FUWAMOCO wacha wacha birthday festival 🎂🐾 【#FWMCbday26】 [7M4E3WGWlRM]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_008.webm

scenes.description: Performance of 'Triangle Dreamerers' featuring Fuwawa, Mococo, Subaru, and Marine.
Post-performance MC section where Fuwawa and Mococo reflect on the song and the experience.

subtitles.original: 私 悩んじゃいます
subtitles.english: I'm starting to worry...

subtitles.original: あーもうすごいヤバい！
subtitles.english: Ah, geez! This is seriously bad!

subtitles.original: 好きだよ！
subtitles.english: I like you!

subtitles.original: あ、好きだけど、
subtitles.english: Ah, I mean I do like you,

subtitles.original: ってそういう意味じゃなくって！
subtitles.english: but not in that way!

subtitles.original: だって女の子同士だし！
subtitles.english: Because we're both girls!

subtitles.original: ねえ神様、
subtitles.english: Hey God,

subtitles.original: どうしたらいいの？
subtitles.english: what should I do?

subtitles.original: 私、
subtitles.english: Me,

subtitles.original: どうしたいの？
subtitles.english: what do I want to do?

subtitles.original: ヘルプミー！
subtitles.english: Help me!

subtitles.original: なんか変だ 愛に故郷も 年も性別も関係ない
subtitles.english:
Something's strange—hometown, age,
or gender don't matter in love.

subtitles.original: けど けど けど
subtitles.english: But, but, but...

subtitles.original: 三角形 三角形の 恋はきまぐれ
subtitles.english: A triangle, a triangle love is fickle.

subtitles.original: 一瞬で 一瞬で くずれるバランス
subtitles.english:
In an instant, in an instant,
the balance collapses.

subtitles.original: 普通の恋 夢みてたのに
subtitles.english: Even though I dreamed of a normal love.

subtitles.original: ノーマル設定の わたしじゃちょっと 無理ゲーすぎます
subtitles.english:
With my 'normal' settings,
it's just too much of a 'trash game.'

subtitles.original: 三角形 三角形の 恋は不安定
subtitles.english: A triangle, a triangle love is unstable.

subtitles.original: なんちゃって なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
subtitles.english:
It's a category that 'just kidding'
won't settle.

subtitles.original: 彼女のこと 好きになれたらな
subtitles.english: If only I could fall in love with her...

subtitles.original: なんて妄想しちゃいます
subtitles.english: I find myself daydreaming.

subtitles.original: わたし どうかしてます
subtitles.english: There's something wrong with me.

subtitles.original: いくよー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Hai!

subtitles.original: ほーい！
subtitles.english: Hoey!

subtitles.original: わおー！
subtitles.english: Waoo!

subtitles.original: Wow, Bau Bau!
subtitles.english: Wow, Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: Thank you Ruffians!
subtitles.english: Thank you Ruffians!

subtitles.original: That was so much fun!
subtitles.english: That was so much fun!

subtitles.original: Yeah, I know, I got a bit dizzy though...
subtitles.english: Yeah, I know, I got a bit dizzy though...

subtitles.original: by the bubble and then changing so quickly!
subtitles.english: by the bubble and then changing so quickly!

subtitles.original: Oh, nice and fast.
subtitles.english: Oh, nice and fast.

subtitles.original: Yeah, you know, just the bubble there was a little bit silly.
subtitles.english:
Yeah, you know, just the bubble there
was a little bit silly.

subtitles.original: But, did we surprise you?
subtitles.english: But, did we surprise you?

subtitles.original: And we got to see you as well, even more close up than usual.
subtitles.english:
And we got to see you as well,
even more close up than usual.

subtitles.original: Oh yeah!
subtitles.english: Oh yeah!

subtitles.original: Wow!
subtitles.english: Wow!

subtitles.original: Those last two songs we sang were 'Kiss Me I'll Stay Together' with Ahoy-tan...
subtitles.english:
Those last two songs we sang were
'Kiss Me I'll Stay Together' with Ahoy-tan...

subtitles.original: ...and 'Triangle Dreamer'!
subtitles.english: ...and 'Triangle Dreamer'!

subtitles.english:
With Miko-senpai, Marine-senpai,
and Subaru-senpai.

subtitles.original: What'd you think, Ruffians?
subtitles.english: What'd you think, Ruffians?

subtitles.original: 'Kiss Me I'll Stay Together' is a song that I've always wanted to sing together with Ahoy-tan.
subtitles.english:
'Kiss Me I'll Stay Together' is a song

subtitles.original: It's a little bit more sexy, a bit of a sexy song, huh?
subtitles.english:
It's a little bit more sexy,
a bit of a sexy song, huh?

subtitles.original: Yeah, and 'Triangle Dreamer'! The best-of-all idol song!
subtitles.english:
Yeah, and 'Triangle Dreamer'!
The best-of-all idol song!

subtitles.original: そう、ゆり展開が尊すぎて、え、ラフィアンズ、まだ生きてる？
subtitles.english:
Right, the yuri developments were so precious...
Wait, Ruffians, are you still alive?

subtitles.original: え、生きてる？
subtitles.english: Eh, are you alive?

subtitles.original: Yeah, Bau Bau!
subtitles.english: Yeah, Bau Bau!

subtitles.original: All our senpais were so cute! In love!
subtitles.english: All our senpais were so cute! In love!

subtitles.original: And crowd surfing on the bubble!
subtitles.english: And crowd surfing on the bubble!

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: It was a blast, a lot of firsts this year, right?
subtitles.english: It was a blast, a lot of firsts this year, right?

subtitles.original: Well, we have a tiny, tiny announcement!
subtitles.english: Well, we have a tiny, tiny announcement!

subtitles.original: Huh? You know, it's FuwaMoco, it's our birthday, right?
subtitles.english:
Huh? You know, it's FuwaMoco,
it's our birthday, right?

subtitles.original: And so, we have something we'd like to share with you.
subtitles.english:
And so, we have something we'd like to

subtitles.original: Okay! Ready? Don-doko-don!
subtitles.english: Okay! Ready? Don-doko-don!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: It's time to celebrate both of our birthdays with our FuwaMoco 2026 Birthday Merch!
subtitles.english:
It's time to celebrate both of

subtitles.original: フワモコの生誕グッズ紹介、始まるよー！
subtitles.english:
Introducing the FuwaMoco birthday goods!
Here we go!

subtitles.original: First, we became fluffy and fuzzy idols with the Fuwa Fuwa Idol Fuwawa...
subtitles.english:
First, we became fluffy and fuzzy idols
with the Fuwa Fuwa Idol Fuwawa...

subtitles.original: ...and Moco Moco Idol Mococo acrylic stands, drawn by our Mama, Icomochi-mama!
subtitles.english:
...and Moco Moco Idol Mococo acrylic stands,
drawn by our Mama, Icomochi-mama!

subtitles.original: They're rather big compared to regular acrylic stands, so we think they'd be a great addition to your collection!
subtitles.english:
They're rather big compared to regular
acrylic stands, so we think they'd be a
great addition to your collection!

subtitles.original: Next, we have the silly Ehehe Angel and Hoeh?! Devil rubber figurines.
subtitles.english:
Next, we have the silly Ehehe Angel

subtitles.original: Win-out palm-sized figures perfect for displaying on your desk!
subtitles.english:
Win-out palm-sized figures perfect for

subtitles.original: ハロウィン衣装のフワモコが、手のひらサイズのラバーマスコットになったよ！
subtitles.english:
FuwaMoco in their Halloween outfits

subtitles.original: This one is big!
subtitles.english: This one is big!

subtitles.original: We finally have FuwaMoco plushies in our Out-and-About casual outfits!
subtitles.english:
We finally have FuwaMoco plushies

subtitles.original: But this time, we also speak when you house us!
subtitles.english:

subtitles.english:
